title: Fix Stored XSS in Multiple Metrics Fields (LOB, Topic, Owner, Definition)
description:
**Penetration Test Finding — High Severity**

Multiple fields in the Metrics section were vulnerable to Stored XSS: Line of Business, Topic, Owner, and Definition. Users with metric editing permissions could inject JavaScript payloads through the manual data entry flow (Start Import > Enter Data Manually) that would execute for all users visiting the Metrics page.

## Fix

Input sanitization applied to all affected fields (Line of Business, Topic, Owner, Definition) before storage, stripping HTML/script tags to prevent stored XSS.
acceptance_criteria: HTML and script tags are sanitized from Line of Business, Topic, Owner, and Definition fields
XSS payloads in manual data entry are neutralized
Legitimate text content in all fields is preserved
middleware_changes: Input sanitization applied to Line of Business, Topic, Owner, and Definition fields in the metrics manual entry and update controllers.
implementation_notes: Same sanitization approach applied broadly across all user-editable Metrics fields: LOB, Topic, Owner, and Definition. Covers both creation and update flows.
comment_summary: Developer fixed and pushed to staging.
